## Summary

Describe the behavior and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] Repository guard passes.
- [ ] Skill frontmatter and instructions were validated.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has synthetic tests.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No real session data, user profile, credential, private path, or third-party personal data is included.
- [ ] Imported content remains untrusted and cannot activate a preference without user approval.
- [ ] The change adds no telemetry or network access, or the new behavior has an explicit opt-in design review.
- [ ] Dependencies are unchanged, or supply-chain risk and necessity are documented.
- [ ] Deletion and supersession behavior remains complete.
